headline: Food Megamergers Hardly Ever Work. Could McCormick-Unilever Be Different?
summary: Combining with Unilever’s food division would remake McCormick into a global powerhouse, but the recent history of Big Food mergers hits a cautionary note.

headline: PepsiCo: Elliott's Catalyst + 4% Yield = The Defensive Buy Of 2026
summary: PepsiCo is trading at a rare valuation discount with a 3.9% dividend yield and a $185 price target. Read why I rate PEP stock a buy now.
